_comment: VIB-5410 held-PT fixture capture config. Reproduces tests/fixtures/accounting/pendle_pt_held/expected_baseline.sqlite. Run: `uv run almanak strat run -d strategies/accounting/pendle_pt -c <this file> --network anvil --fresh --interval 20`, let it warmup-hold -> PT_BUY -> hold, then SIGTERM the runner WHILE STILL HOLDING (no teardown signal) so the final snapshot keeps the PT (PT!=0). hold_iterations_before_exit=50 ensures it never sells in the window. trade_size 15 wstETH sizes the buy-vs-mark spread above the G6 epsilon so the held-PT MTM term is load-bearing (a 0.01 buy is under epsilon on this deep pool). The strategy advertises ethereum (decorator) and resolves the chain via self.chain, so this runs on the committed source unchanged.
